1.description: get Trondheim municipality number and geometry

2.description: get quick-clay kartleggingsområder (polygons) to reduce to Trondheim extent

3.description: get buildings in Trondheim (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (unique bygningid)

7.description: count distinct buildings that intersect quick-clay

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%trondheim%' AND gyldigtil IS NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, kartleggingstatus, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["bygningid"]
-- metric_column: "objid_right"
-- metric_as: "min_kvikkleire_objid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
